mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_id, issue_type, fingerprint, title, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, occurrence_count, latest_event_id, status, assignee, priority, comment_count, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_issue
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_issue ( project_id, issue_type, fingerprint, title, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, occurrence_count, latest_event_id, status, priority, comment_count ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{issueType}, #{fingerprint}, #{title}, #{firstSeenAt}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{occurrenceCount}, #{latestEventId}, #{status}, 'MEDIUM', 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_issue SET title = #{title}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, latest_event_id = #{latestEventId}, occurrence_count = occurrence_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
